chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Hello friends, welcome to Gate Smashers.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: In this video I am going to explain what is grammar in TOC.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Grammar is an important topic of TOC because to understand TOC you should know the concept of grammar.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: TOC is the most important topic.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Even if we talk about your college or university level exam,

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: there also grammar is an important topic of TOC for you.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So guys quickly like the video, subscribe to the channel if you haven't done it yet

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: and please press the bell button so that you get all the latest notifications.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So let's start, what is grammar in TOC?

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So grammar is exactly the same as the concept of grammar in natural language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: And in natural language we take example of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Now in English language we study grammar, in school we are studying already the concept of grammar.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: What is grammar? Why do we use grammar in English?

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: First use is that it tells whether a particular sentence is a part of English language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: How? We will write the sentence, we will check whether it is grammatically fine or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: If it is grammatically fine then we will say that yes, it is a part of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: If it is not grammatically fine means if it is well formed then we will say yes, it is a part of language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: If it is not well formed then we will say it is not a part of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So here grammar is the standard way of representing a language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So note this point, what is the use of grammar? It is the standard way of representing a language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Like in English I write here is your coffee.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: We write a simple sentence, here is your coffee.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So see we check in this that here we have noun, pronoun, adverb, we are using alphabets.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: We use many grammatical funda and on their basis we check whether it is a part of English language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So yes, it is a part of English language. We can also write it in other way like your coffee is here.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Is your coffee here? This is also a part of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: If I write this is here coffee yours.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: See is here coffee yours.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Now in this although this is also a part of English language means it is an English sentence.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: But will it come in English language? No.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: The reason is we will say that there is a grammatical error in it.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So it is not a part of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So what you will get to know from grammar?

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Grammar will tell you whether a particular string is a part of language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So that is a very important point in TOC.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So there are two methods.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: You have to check any string whether it is a part of language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: One is automata which we have already discussed in the last video

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: that how we decide from automata whether a string comes in the language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: And the second method which we are discussing today that is grammar.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So from grammar you will get to know that yes it is a part of English language.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: And if we talk in TOC then what we are discussing in TOC also

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: that if we have given a particular string or if you are given any topic

chunks.text: on the basis of that you have given any grammar,

chunks.text: You can get the language that which language we can generate in it,

chunks.text: which string we can generate or any particular string

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: whether it comes in that grammar or that language or not.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: You can also check this with the help of grammar.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: So grammar G is defined as quadruple.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: It is made up of four things that is VTPS.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: What is V here? Variable.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Variable which we denote with capital letter.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: And terminal is T and we denote it with small letter.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: What is the meaning of terminal? Terminate.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Means if you want to terminate a string then what you use? Use terminal.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: Variable means you can put on its value again and again.

chunks.title: What is Grammar in TOC Must Watch 480P
chunks.text: You can increase the value again and again.

chunks.text: That is a very important point.

chunks.text: So let's pose a simple, let's take a simple example.

text: Hello friends, welcome to Gate Smashers. In this video I am going to explain what is grammar in TOC. Grammar is an important topic of TOC because to understand TOC you should know the concept of grammar. Apart from this if we talk about any competitive exam in which the portion of computer science comes, TOC is the most important topic. Even if we talk about your college or university level exam, there also grammar is an important topic of TOC for you. So guys quickly like the video, subscribe to the channel if you haven't done it yet and please press the bell button so that you get all the latest notifications. So let's start, what is grammar in TOC? So grammar is exactly the same as the concept of grammar in natural language. And in natural language we take example of English language. Now in English language we study grammar, in school we are studying already the concept of grammar. What is grammar? Why do we use grammar in English? First use is that it tells whether a particular sentence is a part of English language or not. How? We will write the sentence, we will check whether it is grammatically fine or not. If it is grammatically fine then we will say that yes, it is a part of English language. If it is not grammatically fine means if it is well formed then we will say yes, it is a part of language.
